name: Oatmeal Chip Cookies/The Dessert Show
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix corn flakes, oatmeal, coconut, pecans, and semisweet chocolate chips.
3. Cream together butter, brown sugar, and white sugar in a mixer.
4. Add eggs, vanilla, flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt to the creamed mixture and mix well.
5. Combine the dry mixture with the creamed mixture and mix well.
6. Use about 1/4 cup of batter for each cookie, placing six cookies on a baking sheet.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly brown.
